reason_not_added_to_active: These records appear relevant and current, but at least one required active field still needs direct official-source confirmation, usually contractor, exact contract package, or source-specific progress page URL. They are saved as candidates instead of being mixed into active map data.

next_validation_steps: Open the official project or procurement pages for each candidate and capture exact source URLs.
Confirm contractor names and contract-package names before active promotion.
